description_long: This sculpture is a stone effigy of a reclining human figure, likely representing a historical or religious figure, lying atop a rectangular sarcophagus or tomb. The figure is draped in flowing robes, with detailed folds visible in the garment, and the head rests on a pillow, suggesting a state of repose or eternal rest. The feet are prominently displayed at one end, while the hands are crossed or gently placed on the torso. The rectangular base is solid and unadorned, providing a stark contrast to the intricately carved figure above. The overall appearance is reminiscent of funerary monuments found in ancient or medieval European contexts. The material appears to be a light-colored stone, possibly marble or limestone, with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A stone effigy of a reclining robed figure atop a rectangular sarcophagus, with detailed drapery and a serene, resting pose. The sculpture is carved from light-colored stone and features a solid, unadorned base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the feet of the reclining figure and the length of the sarcophagus, with the head visible at the far end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the draped robes, and the pillow supporting the head.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the head and pillow, with the feet extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the figure, with the arms and drapery details visible.
attribute_subject_matter: reclining human figure on a sarcophagus
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
